meta.dc:title: 119 HJRES 140 ENR: Providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Bureau of Land Management relating to Public Land Order No. 7917 for Withdrawal of Federal Lands; Cook, Lake, and Saint Louis Counties, MN.
meta.dc:creator: United States House of Representatives
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

preface.congress: One Hundred Nineteenth Congress of the United States of America
preface.session: A T T H E S E C O N D S E S S I O N
preface.enrolledDateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Saturday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty-six

longTitle.officialTitle: Providing for congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Bureau of Land Management relating to Public Land Order No. 7917 for Withdrawal of Federal Lands; Cook, Lake, and Saint Louis Counties, MN.

resolvingClause.i: Resolved by the Senate and House of Representatives of the United States of America in Congress assembled,

section.content: That Congress disapproves the rule submitted by the Bureau of Land Management of the Department of the Interior relating to Public Land Order No. 7917 for Withdrawal of Federal Lands; Cook, Lake, and Saint Louis Counties, MN (88 Fed. Reg. 6308 (January 31, 2023)), and such rule shall have no force or effect.

signature.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives.
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate.
